required_preferences.fact: Prepares kid-friendly meals and snacks daily due to full-time childcare needs; now focuses on batch-cooking and flexible meal options for her niece throughout the week

supersedes.fact: Prepares kid-friendly dinners and healthy snacks in advance for her niece whenever she expects evening babysitting

required_preferences.fact: Uses preventive migraine medication daily as prescribed and monitors for side effects; only uses acute medication for breakthrough symptoms, not routinely at first sign

supersedes.fact: Carries migraine medication in her work bag at all times and takes it at first sign of symptoms — never waits for a full attack

required_preferences.fact: Prefers puzzle games for stress relief after work — never plays competitive online games
Blocks off early evenings for her mother's care, temporarily pausing nonessential social invitations and personal leisure outings after work
Prepares weeknight dinners together with her boyfriend at home, prioritizing quick, healthy recipes over takeout
Limits screen exposure at home by setting devices to night mode after 8pm

persona: An entry-level support agent at a regional telecommunications provider
